title: MC Preference Center Refresh (investigation)
summaryBody: Achieve a lower average unsubscribe rate for BAU email sends by promoting the preference centre to subscribers, thereby increasing their control over the emails they receive.
detailBody: Achieve a lower average unsubscribe rate for BAU email sends by promoting the preference centre to subscribers, thereby increasing their control over the emails they receive.
